functions.name: Missing error handling
functions.description: Async operations should have proper error handling. Note: This is a suggestion - if you handle errors differently, you can ignore this.

functions.name: Throwing errors in callbacks
functions.description: Throwing in callbacks can cause unhandled exceptions. Use error parameters instead.

functions.name: Missing finally block
functions.description: Finally blocks ensure cleanup code runs regardless of errors.

functions.name: Function without try-catch
functions.description: Functions that perform async operations, I/O, or external calls should have error handling. Pure functions with no side effects don't need try-catch. Note: This is a best-effort check and may have false positives - use .attuneignore if needed.

recommendation.title: Add error handling to async/I/O functions
recommendation.description: Functions that perform async operations, I/O, or external calls should have error handling. Pure functions with no side effects don't need try-catch. Note: This is a best-effort check and may have false positives - use .attuneignore if needed.

fix: Add try-catch to functions with external calls

params.message: Async/I/O function may need error handling (no try-catch found)
